Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Dismissal - No Appearance

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories And Document Demands; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Carol Ann Spinale
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elisabeth Hanowsky, Esq. 415-359-0900 of the Law Offices of Daniel A. Conrad for DEFENDANT THOMAS LUCAS.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Unopposed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THOMAS LUCAS' Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Special Interrogatories And Document Demands; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Carol Ann Spinale is Granted.

The motion is unopposed and is granted in its entirety, including an award of sanctions for discovery abuse in the amount of $1335.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAROL SPINALE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice.
Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
